name: Homemade Mincemeat
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large, heavy pot.
2. Simmer until thick.
3. Makes about 3 quarts.
4. Freeze mincemeat in one-cup portions.
Serving Information:
- 1/3 cup serving contains approximately 4 calories
- 1 Fruit & Vegetable choice
- .6 grams protein, .2 grams fat, 11.3 grams carbohydrate, 1 gram fiber
